The pricing looks reasonable, but I need to make sure this won't be another tool that works great in the demo but crashes when I'm trying to pull quarterly metrics for the board presentation.
These customer testimonials are encouraging, but I really need to see evidence that their support team actually responds quickly when things break - I can't afford downtime during sprint reviews.
This interface looks clean, but let me test if I can actually complete a basic task without having to dive into documentation or ask engineering for help with setup.
They want my email before showing me the full feature list? That's exactly the kind of friction that makes me wonder what they're hiding about their actual capabilities.
Finally, a tool that actually does what it promises without requiring me to become a data engineer just to generate basic reports for stakeholders.
